name: PER_NUDGE_PLAN_NUDGES_VL
query: SELECT B.PLAN_NUDGE_ID, TL.NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION, B.PLAN_NUDGE_CODE, B.NUDGE_PLAN_ID, B.PRODUCT_CODE, B.NUDGE_TYPE_CODE, B.STATUS, B.INPUT_PARAMETER1, B.INPUT_PARAMETER2, B.INPUT_PARAMETER3, B.INPUT_PARAMETER4, B.INPUT_PARAMETER5, B.INPUT_PARAMETER6, B.INPUT_PARAMETER7, B.INPUT_PARAMETER8, B.INPUT_PARAMETER9, B.INPUT_PARAMETER10, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_NUMBER1, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_NUMBER2, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_NUMBER3, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_NUMBER4, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_NUMBER5, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_DATE1, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_DATE2, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_DATE3, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_DATE4, B.INPUT_PARAMETER_DATE5, B.EXPIRY_FLAG, B.EXPIRY_DURATION, B.EXPIRY_DURATION_UOM, B.EXPIRY_RELATIVE_TO, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_NUDGE_PLAN_NUDGES_B B, PER_NUDGE_PLAN_NUDGES_TL TL WHERE B.PLAN_NUDGE_ID = TL.PLAN_NUDGE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
